description: Website activity deliverable: integration team committed to September delivery -- is this confirmed? If so, website activity must be formally removed from July release scope.
What is the opportunity sizing for each analytics experiment in the leadership team backlog? Deepak has blocked spending time until each has sizing.
What is Langfuse API/MCP endpoint? Stephen committed to sending -- needed for Analytics AI observability/monitoring.
WhatsApp analytics prototype: what differentiators should be locked before presenting to broader stakeholders? NJ is still refining.
Analytics AI Monetization Strategy: free users get 3 prompts/month then upgrade prompt -- is this the final monetization model or still draft?
x531 and Analytics insight on homepage sync (Apr 28 with Jen Wang): what decisions need to be made to unblock this feature?
Mailchimp AI GTM Messaging Strategy: multiple comments from Deepak flagging vague claims and competitor benchmarking gaps -- who owns resolution?
